Moving all my feeds from Newsfire into Google Reader. This is part of packing, too, because I only plan on bringing my iPhone to AZ. No comp
Packing right now is less about trying to transport my belongings somewhere, but what kind of person I'm going to be where I'm going.
Packing. And I found my wallet in the inside pocket of one of my blazers. The nice one. It's the only designer thing I own (Christian Dior)
Thinking of taking a walk in the rain.
I just found myself laughing and saying outloud "yeah that's really weird" to myself. Reading blogs. Whatever.
I love showers. I would like to sleep soon but I dunno if it'll happen.
Gonna take a shower...
And thank you to @scanner_darkly and @safetyguy1656 for the happy birthdays. I missed 'em somehow.

commits.message: Fix remaining hardcoded strings caught by skeptical review
Add i18n translations for signal details panel
Update crashBoundary and updateProgressOverlay to use i18n
Update financialDashboard to use i18n chart labels
Fix saveMenu i18n and update CreditsPage
Update LoadSavePage to use i18n translations
Update SystemSettingsPanel to use i18n
Update saveMenu to use i18n translations
Update TutorialOverlay to use i18n translations
Add 100+ translated strings for full app i18n support (EN/ES/FR)
fix: resolve linter and typecheck errors for CI
Add i18n support for Electron migration wizard dialogs
perf: move verbose logging behind DEBUG flag to improve performance
Fix migration wizard to auto-show dialog on first startup
Add .metro save format with migration wizard and emergency OOM fix
fix: NYC borough map crash - regenerate outline as FeatureCollection
fix: NJ Governor candidates not displaying - pulse crash and date format bugs
feat: complete Tauri desktop app with full database integration
fix: force 2025 Governor General Election on every app load
fix: handle missing candidates for 2025 Governor races (DDHQENG-732)
refactor: improve broadcast colors implementation
Fix critical bug: Recursively search subdirectories for save files
Fix critical save system bugs and add Open Folder button
fix: set default view to 2025 Governor General Election
fix: set default view to 2025 Governor General Election
fix: SYNC_FROM_CONTROLLER regression and poll color flipping (DDHQENG-741)
fix: SYNC_FROM_CONTROLLER regression and poll color flipping (DDHQENG-741)
Merge remote changes and keep lint fixes
Fix all linting errors and warnings in autosave branch
